violations.description: Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface was not disassembled for proper cleaning. - Meat slicer in need of proper cleaning between uses.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - Large equipment (prep tables, refrigerators, etc...) front doors, side panels, and handles in need of cleaning.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. - Dishwasher tested at 0 ppm CHL. Jug with sanitizer was full. Attempts at priming the tube was not successful. Maintenance needed. Regular/routine tests for concentration needed after fixed to maintain proper sanitizing. Keep test strips near machine and train staff how to use.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Adequate, shielded, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean clothes, hair restraints, fingernail maint., jewelry, eating/drinking (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Prevented, separated, segregated (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
